Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:3000/api/attendance/today" | python -c "
import sys, json
rows = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'{'Staff':<20} {'Status':<10} {'Check In':<12} {'Check Out':<12}'\)
print\('-' * 56\)
for r in rows:
    s = r['staff']
    a = r['attendance']
    name = f\\"{s['firstName']} {s['lastName']}\\"
    status = a['attendanceStatus'] if a else 'ABSENT'
    ci = a['checkInTime'][11:16] if a and a['checkInTime'] else '—'
    co = a['checkOutTime'][11:16] if a and a['checkOutTime'] else '—'
    print\(f'{name:<20} {status:<10} {ci:<12} {co:<12}'\)
" 2>&1)
